text.content: Premium 3-stage solid resilient tire optimized for durability and performance. Designed with a durable tread compound to supply 15% more wear resistance. Improved center compound delivers 25% more heat resistance than the MS701. Enhanced mixing and building process ensures optimum performance in the working environment.
